description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle with a sleek, angular design and a predominantly matte black finish. The rifle features a bullpup configuration, with the magazine and action located behind the trigger for a compact profile. It is equipped with a red dot sight mounted on the top rail, enhancing target acquisition in urban environments. The stock is integrated into the body, with a pronounced pistol grip and a red accent at the base, likely for ergonomic or aesthetic purposes. The barrel is relatively short and thick, suggesting a design optimized for maneuverability and stability. The overall construction appears to be a mix of metal and polymer, typical for contemporary urban firearms.
description: A compact, matte black bullpup rifle with a red dot sight and red-accented pistol grip, designed for tactical use. Features a short, thick barrel and integrated stock for urban maneuverability.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the red dot sight, bullpup layout, and red-accented grip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening, sight alignment, and compact width.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the main features with clear visibility of the sight and grip.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the stock, sight, and the overall narrowness of the rifle.
